# Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Contributor Covenant, v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

In short: be respectful, assume good faith, no harassment, no personal
attacks. Maintainers may edit or remove comments, commits, issues, and PRs
that don't align with this, and may ban repeat offenders.

Report unacceptable behavior privately to the maintainer via GitHub
(@tieuanhquoc). All reports are handled confidentially.
